comment: The invoice doubled after the discount vanished; support blamed the plan migration.
Great, another midnight outage during our renewal week.
The dashboard is cleaner, but exporting filtered rows still takes ages.
Maria solved the SSO issue in 10 minutes. Super helpful.
Why does the basic plan cost more than last quarter with fewer included reports?
Sync says complete, yet half of the records are missing.
The new keyboard shortcuts are fast once you find the settings page.
I waited 47 minutes and the agent pasted the same help article twice.
The renewal quote is probably fine, but I cannot reconcile the tax line.
Export failed again after saying success. That is a fun definition of success.
Gracias, the billing specialist fixed the tax exemption quickly.
The page loads, then jumps around while I am editing a workflow.
API latency spiked every afternoon this week.
The product is okay, but the price jump is hard to justify.
Onboarding was smooth and the support rep anticipated our questions.
Two admins cannot log in after the role migration.
I like the reports, I do not like needing five clicks to schedule one.
